stemHtml: Your company call sign is Skyfall FOUR SEVEN. When and how may it be changed back to the aircraft registration G-ACZG?

options.a: Only for safety reasons, when ATC instructs "Change your call sign to GOLF ALFA CHARLIE ZULU GOLF".
options.b: Whenever convenient, ask ATC and they will instruct at an appropriate time.
options.c: Any time you wish, just inform ATC of the change.
options.d: Either call sign may be used at any time since both are on the flight plan.
